rationale: Changes the default semantics of the core generation path (expanded now fails closed on a compressed plan), touches prompt contracts an LLM depends on, and introduces a downstream data contract consumed by two later phases. Reversibility is moderate (mode flag + alias), but the blast radius (every expanded run) and the cross-phase contract earn a full document with explicit alternatives, ADR, rollout, and failure modes.

intentionally_omitted.reason: No new services/infra; CLI + library change only
No new persisted user data; artifacts are deterministic plan/coverage JSON inside the bundle
